scope.closed_by_this_contract: The fixed post-B4 XO-001 logical chair-analysis result, diagnostic display, cold calculation, unchanged reuse, Undo/Redo of that reuse and save/reopen persistence are reproducible and bounded.
scope.still_open: Every calculation-input invalidation class, turnout/plain-line and wider crossover coverage, the B15 layout/support/solid chain, real-GUI presentation semantics and all successor fixes remain open.
scope.product_effect: Evidence and successor acceptance rules only; neither B14 nor B15 product source is changed.
scope.provenance_boundary: The positions, family labels and current chair-code assignments are immutable legacy comparison evidence, not project-cleared chair definitions, dimensions or production data. Existing lineage and output-manifest gates still apply.

b15.role: accepted behavioural reference using the inherited analysis core plus workflow instrumentation

fixture.safety_rule: Copy the fixture to a temporary directory, mutate only the copy, close it and require the source fixture bytes to remain unchanged.

scenario.settings_source: B14 default chair-analysis settings persisted with the crossover
scenario.execution_boundary: Call analyse_entity_chair_positions directly so panel refresh and asynchronous bridge overhead remain separate.

display.architectural_role: Legacy derived diagnostic presentation only; the logical positions are authoritative and a successor must not retain this Part edge compound as railway state.

persistence_boundary.reopen_result: The logical core, geometry signature, two display identities and shape survive save/close/reopen, and the next direct analysis reports calculation and display reuse.
persistence_boundary.reuse_history_witness: Undo immediately after unchanged reuse restores the cold persisted payload; Redo restores the reuse payload. The cache hit therefore creates a document-history entry even though logical and display semantics are unchanged.

legacy_defects.premature_timing_persistence: performance_timings_ms is written before metadata, display, recompute, commit and total are measured, so the returned and persisted payloads disagree and reopen retains the truncated form.
legacy_defects.unchanged_reuse_still_mutates: The cache lookup occurs only after rebuilding all rail and timber records; a hit still opens a transaction, serialises and rewrites the roughly 1.5 MB result and visibility, dirties the document and adds an Undo entry.
legacy_defects.repeated_effective_status_scan: Each chair_analysis_effective_status call independently rebuilds rail and timber records and recomputes the geometry signature; no command-scoped shared status snapshot exists.
legacy_defects.redundant_panel_refresh: The active panel run_analysis calls _refresh_parent, whose callback and own refresh run, and then calls self.refresh again. The accepted GUI action was 120.415 seconds despite reporting reuse.

rules: Cold calculation, cache reuse, save/reopen and any presentation-only update must expose one canonical signature-bound logical result.
Persist the final complete timing payload only after metadata, presentation, recompute and commit have completed, and reconcile it with the enclosing operator-action boundary.
An unchanged current logical result and current presentation must return before rail/timber record extraction, metadata serialisation, document mutation, history creation or recompute.
Compute effective chair/support/layout/solid status from one command-scoped dependency snapshot or demonstrably bounded signature cache, with exact invalidation when a relevant input changes.
Refresh the manager and chair panel once from the accepted command result; do not recursively rescan the document or reconstruct equivalent state.
Keep calculation-signature inputs separate from presentation controls. Visibility-only changes must reuse the logical result and update only lightweight derived presentation.
Treat logical positions, assignments and stable identities as model output and diagnostic geometry as replaceable presentation; exact chair solids remain a Validate/Export concern.
Preserve the fixed semantic digests unless an engineering-rule change is explicitly reviewed, but do not infer project-cleared provenance from oracle parity.
remaining_matrix: each rail, timber, tolerance, assignment and calculation-setting invalidation class
turnout, plain-line and wider crossover configurations
B15 bounded-support, 2D-layout, supported-solid and integration dependencies
real-GUI selection, visibility, one-refresh and one-command history evidence
lightweight presentation prototype and deferred exact-shape agreement
field-level lineage and dependency manifest for any advertised chair output
successor_acceptance.migration_gate: Do not move or remove the legacy chair-analysis path until the successor passes these rules, the full matrix required for its advertised entity scope and user-approved GUI evidence.
